title: lespedeza reticulata var. sessiliflora
intro: Lespedeza reticulata var. sessiliflora, also known as the purple lespedeza or Korean clover, is a perennial legume native to East Asia, characterized by its small purple flowers and nitrogen-fixing properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Lespedeza reticulata var. sessiliflora include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Lespedeza reticulata var. sessiliflora can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used as a dietary supplement in some herbal preparations.
